stemHtml: A constant delivery hydraulic pump provides (1) _____ and (2) _____. A demand pump works by supplying (3) _____ and (4) _____.

options.a: (1) constant pressure; (2) fixed volume; (3) constant pressure; (4) constant volume.
options.b: (1) varying pressure; (2) fixed volume; (3) constant pressure; (4) variable volume.
options.c: (1) varying pressure; (2) varying volume; (3) constant volume; (4) variable pressure.
options.d: (1) constant pressure; (2) varying volume; (3) variable volume; (4) variable pressure.
